google_secret_manager_secret_version_ver.description: Specifies the version of the secret to use, required for accessing a specific iteration within Google Secret Manager.

is_secret_data_base64.description: Specifies whether the secret data is provided in base64-encoded format; must be true for base64 input and false for raw string data.

secret.description: Specifies the data stored in the secret version. Must be a valid UTF-8 encoded string.
